message:
refactor(connectors): standardize self-check status to "ok"/"degraded" vocabulary

Replace "ready"/"unconfigured" with "ok"/"degraded" across all connector
self-check responses and their tests. The new vocabulary follows
cloud-native health conventions -- "ok" means fully operational, "degraded"
means functional but missing configuration. Updated in all 15 connector
implementations and 22 integration test suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
